description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On June 5 (Friday), Reiwa 8 (2026), the second regular session of the Hanno City Council opened.

The session runs from June 5 to June 23. Council members will review a total of 29 agenda items, including a request for approval of emergency decisions, ordinance proposals, and supplementary budget proposals.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202606/13650.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City Council Regular Session No. 2, Reiwa 8 (2026)
